name: Colbor Wonder W60 Bi-Color LED Monolight
description: The COLBOR W60 are portable LED lights for video. Each combines advanced technology with a camera-inspired look, delivering an impressive 60W of power.

features.Key Features :: For Content Creators & Vloggers | Output: 4770 Lux at 3.3' w/ Reflector | 2700-6500K CCT | AC Power; Accepts Optional Battery Grips | Supports PD USB-C Fast Charging | Onboard & App Controll; NFC Connection | CRI 97 | TLCI 99 | Quiet Fan Cooling | Portable Pocket-Size Design | Includes Reflector, Dome & Power Adapter
features.Standard Package: W60 Video Light | Plum Tail Cable | Power Adapter (with Wire Lanyard) | Reflector | COB Cover | Dome
